title: Yet Another Custom Modpack (YACM)
description: Yet Another Custom Modpack offers QOL improvements with performance optimisations, vanilla-plus features, and extended exploration. The pack also includes mods like Essential and Open Parties and Claims for a seamless multiplayer experience with friends.
body:
### Yet Another Custom Modpack is for Minecraft version 1.20.1. This modpack offers various quality-of-life improvements, focusing on enhancing performance, introducing subtle vanilla-plus features like backpacks, essential commands, and easy anvils/enchantment/shulker boxes for convenience, and expanding copper's uses. 

#### Disclaimer: None of the content in this pack is personally made by me. All credits go to respective mod authors! Refer to the list down below for the original links for each mod, resource pack, and dependency.

#### Mods included in this modpack:
- [Additional Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/addadd)
- [Alloy Forgery](https://modrinth.com/mod/alloy-forgery)
- [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
